description: Firebase Dynamic Links is a Firebase service for creating links that route users to platform-specific destinations and support attribution and analytics. The `firebasedynamiclinks.googleapis.com` domain hosts the backend API used to create short links and retrieve Dynamic Links-related data.
summary: 1 HTTP API: Firebase Dynamic Links REST API at `https://firebasedynamiclinks.googleapis.com/v1`, authenticated with a Firebase project Web API key in the `key` query parameter.
